paragraphs: I'm applying for the Senior Product Designer role at Northwind Labs. Your design system work is the part of the product I'd brag about, and it's exactly the work I want to own.

For the past three years I've led design for a B2B analytics platform used by 400+ teams: I built the design system (60+ components, tokens, docs) that three product squads ship with, and I write production React alongside the design work, so my components arrive working.
My resume is attached in your preferred format; the same data renders to sixteen designs, which says something about how I think about systems. I'd love to talk.
